instruction_summary: Fetch all currently open remote issues, implement corresponding fixes where appropriate, and close the issues after verification.
actual_work: Swept remote issues in multiple ranges, fixed and closed issues #2-#25, and discovered additional still-open issues #26-#28 during a later follow-up sweep. Implemented renderer-side Docusaurus navigation filtering and portal backlinks, defensive markdown-path normalization for generated site resolution, Mermaid and Kroki diagram support in Docusaurus builds, public URL migration to code/slug/public_id-based routes, import actor selection through DOC_IMPORT_ACTOR_EMAIL, safe path realpath checks for site file serving, centralized AccessLog recording with fail-open behavior for HTML views, and company_master_admin-scoped admin access for own company and users. Updated repo docs to reflect the current route/id rules, site permission filtering rules, document granularity guidance, and diagram build behavior.
changed_files: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

commands.notes: Verified Kroki remark-plugin behavior, asset emission, and missing-endpoint failure.
Confirmed the Docusaurus build succeeds after Mermaid/Kroki support and dependency alignment.

commands.command: /usr/bin/time -f 'elapsed=%E' docker compose run --rm app bundle exec rails runner 'puts :ok'
commands.notes: Measured Rails boot at about 1:04 after narrowing loaded railties.
Closed issues completed in this pass.

tests.command: docker compose run --rm app bundle exec rspec spec/requests/api/internal/doc_imports_spec.rb spec/requests/public_identifier_routes_spec.rb spec/requests/admin_management_spec.rb spec/requests/projects_access_spec.rb spec/requests/project_sites_spec.rb spec/requests/document_sites_spec.rb spec/requests/document_views_spec.rb spec/requests/document_files_spec.rb spec/requests/document_tree_view_spec.rb
